title: Futures: When is it advantageous to use a futures contract instead...
summary: Distinguish futures from forward contracts based on standardization and exchange trading.
prompt: When is it advantageous to use a futures contract instead of a forward contract?

options.text: Futures contracts are standardized and traded on exchanges
An options contract for downside protection

solution: Futures contracts are standardized and traded on exchanges, which generally provides greater liquidity than forward contracts that are customized and traded OTC. This liquidity can lead to better pricing and lower transaction costs for traders.
